title: My Hometown
text:
Wuxi is a city in Jiangsu Province, known for its beautiful scenery and rich culture. 








 Taihu Lake is one of the largest freshwater lakes in China and a symbol of Wuxi. 










 The Lingshan Grand Buddha is one of the tallest Buddha statues in the world. 










 Wuxi cuisine is famous for its slightly sweet taste. Popular dishes include spare ribs and soup dumplings.

title: About

# About

Hi, this is my website.

title: Home
text:
Hi, I’m a Biostatistics graduate student at the University of Michigan.
Welcome to my personal website!





🎂 Birthday: November 6, 1998

📍 Born in: Wuxi, Jiangsu, China

🎓 Major: Biostatistics (M.S.)

💡 Interests: Statistical computing, machine learning, data analysis

🌎 Currently in: Ann Arbor, Michigan








R (tidyverse, modeling, visualization)

Python (data processing, analysis)

Statistical modeling (GLM, GEE, survival analysis)

Data visualization & reporting (Quarto, ggplot2)







I grew up in Wuxi, a beautiful city near Taihu Lake in eastern China.
You can learn more about my hometown here 👉 Wuxi Page
